source_intent.raw_intent: Case 071: I am a founder_operator in Canada. Build a srx_ace_v3_agent for content_system using the runtime_lens. Chaos input type is schema_blur. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for a content system that processes schema_blur chaos input, producing governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Scope: - The agent must handle messy, incomplete, urgent, and ambiguous input from a founder_operator in Canada, using the runtime_lens to resolve schema_blur. Output must be a structured artifact with validation gates and SR8-compilable sections. Constraints: - Must operate within Canadian legal and regulatory frameworks (e.g., PIPEDA for data privacy). - Must not produce harmful, misleading, or non-compliant content. - Must include explicit validation gates for each output section. - Must handle schema_blur by inferring missing context and resolving ambiguities without hallucination. Success Criteria: - Agent produces a governed artifact with all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract. - Validation gates are explicitly defined and pass for each section. - Artifact is compilable by SR8 without errors. - Agent correctly processes schema_blur input and returns a coherent, actionable output. Output Contract: - format: JSON - sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_sections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract - validation_gates: Gate 1: Input schema_blur resolved - confirm all required fields present or inferred.; Gate 2: Legal compliance check - ensure no violation of Canadian laws.; Gate 3: Constraint adherence - verify all constraints are met.; Gate 4: Success criteria validation - confirm all criteria satisfied.; Gate 5: Output contract completeness - ensure all sections present and compilable.
